add_new_user.response:
To add a new user, please follow these steps:

1. Select the user role
2. Fill in user details
3. Upload user image
4. Click submit

User will be added successfully!.

create_new_cart.response:
To Create new cart, please follow these steps:

1. Select the user on behalf of whom the cart is created
2. Select purchase type
3. Choose the date you need it by
4. Click submit
5. Fill in the Shipping details and the account details
6. Add products to cart
7. Submit cart for approval

Once the cart is approved PO will be generated!

update_user.response:
To update user details, please tap the button below: 

1. You will be redirected to the user management page
2. Select the user you want to edit
3. Click on the edit button and edit the user
4. Click on update button

User will be updated successfully!

add_approval_policy.response:
To add a new approval policy:

1. Select approval policy type
2. Set approval rules
3. Assign approvers
4. Assign default approvers
5. Click on the Create Policy button

Tap the button below to get started:

add_new_project.response:
To add a new project:

1. Enter project name
2. Enter project note
3. Assign project manager
4. Enter Project Description

Tap the button below to create a new project:
